name_en: Original quality CF 25.5. Chanel 1112 Caviar leather. Both gold and silver chains are available. The shape, leather texture, stitching, and the fullness and curvature of the quilting are perfect, especially the side details. Friends, please check the version yourself 👻👻 Size: 25.5cm
